## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Pixis and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, brand direction, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/so8Jz5RR8CE_T_sQ6wwxsb-zRBeenKZV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New brand colors shared; shifting to lighter backgrounds for future content](https://fathom.video/share/so8Jz5RR8CE_T_sQ6wwxsb-zRBeenKZV?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [AI-generated images need refinement; exploring ways to maintain brand consistency](https://fathom.video/share/so8Jz5RR8CE_T_sQ6wwxsb-zRBeenKZV?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
  - [Content production ramping up: 10 articles, 25 glossary items incoming](https://fathom.video/share/so8Jz5RR8CE_T_sQ6wwxsb-zRBeenKZV?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Beam Content working on benchmark report and project brief for thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/so8Jz5RR8CE_T_sQ6wwxsb-zRBeenKZV?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)

## Topics

### Brand Direction and Image Generation

  - [Shifting from dark to light backgrounds in brand colors](https://fathom.video/share/so8Jz5RR8CE_T_sQ6wwxsb-zRBeenKZV?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [New color palette shared: purple-green gradient (primary), tan-gray (background), darker accents](https://fathom.video/share/so8Jz5RR8CE_T_sQ6wwxsb-zRBeenKZV?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [AI-generated images need improvement; stock photos preferred for now](https://fathom.video/share/so8Jz5RR8CE_T_sQ6wwxsb-zRBeenKZV?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [Exploring ways to combine AI with consistent brand elements (e.g., backgrounds, logos)](https://fathom.video/share/so8Jz5RR8CE_T_sQ6wwxsb-zRBeenKZV?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Pixis tool for image generation to be implemented soon](https://fathom.video/share/so8Jz5RR8CE_T_sQ6wwxsb-zRBeenKZV?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)

### Content Production and Strategy

  - [10 new articles and 25 glossary items to be delivered by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/so8Jz5RR8CE_T_sQ6wwxsb-zRBeenKZV?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)

  - [Automatic internal linking now functional in content workflow](https://fathom.video/share/so8Jz5RR8CE_T_sQ6wwxsb-zRBeenKZV?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
  - [Exploring future external link building and inbound internal linking strategies](https://fathom.video/share/so8Jz5RR8CE_T_sQ6wwxsb-zRBeenKZV?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)

### Ongoing Projects
